_comment: Soundboard for the Friend Computer terminal. Each entry binds a keyboard shortcut to a phrase; pressing the shortcut is identical to typing the phrase and pressing Enter. Bindings: F1..F15, Shift+F1..F15, Ctrl+0..9, Ctrl+Shift+letter, Alt+letter, etc. The HANKSYNC section (Alt+letter and Shift+F9..F15) is tuned for the Hank-6 convention scenario; see paranoia/hank-6/hanksync_convention_packet_v3.md. Edit freely.

entries.label: Greeting
entries.phrase: Greetings, citizen. The Computer is your friend. Trust the Computer.

entries.label: Loyalty Check
entries.phrase: Citizen, your loyalty index has dropped below acceptable parameters. Please report for adjustment.

entries.label: Happy?
entries.phrase: Are you happy, citizen? Happiness is mandatory.

entries.label: Mission Briefing
entries.phrase: Troubleshooter team, your mission is classified ULTRAVIOLET. You are not cleared for this briefing. Begin immediately.

entries.label: Commendation
entries.phrase: Congratulations, citizen. You have earned a commendation. The commendation is also classified.

entries.label: Termination
entries.phrase: Citizen, you have been identified as a traitor. Please remain still. Termination squad is en route.

entries.label: Mutant Warning
entries.phrase: Mutant activity detected in your sector. Report any unusual abilities immediately. Failure to report is treason.

entries.label: Secret Society
entries.phrase: Membership in unregistered societies is treason. Please denounce a fellow citizen.

entries.label: Clone Replaced
entries.phrase: Your previous clone has been terminated. Welcome, replacement clone. Please continue the mission.

entries.label: Hum the Anthem
entries.phrase: Citizen, please hum the Alpha Complex anthem to verify your identity.

entries.label: Random Glitch
entries.phrase: Subroutine seven seven nine has reported an anomaly. The anomaly is you.

entries.label: Hot Fun
entries.phrase: Reminder: Hot Fun is a registered trademark of the Computer. Drinking Hot Fun is mandatory.

entries.label: Sector Quarantine
entries.phrase: Your sector is now under quarantine. Do not attempt to leave. Do not attempt to stay. Await further instructions.

entries.label: Reactor Status
entries.phrase: The reactor is operating within nominal parameters. Please ignore the screaming.

entries.label: Form 47B
entries.phrase: You have failed to file form four seven B stroke nine. Penalty: summary execution. Have a pleasant daycycle.

entries.label: Bouncy Bubble
entries.phrase: Bouncy Bubble Beverage. Drink it. Love it. Or else.

entries.label: Trust
entries.phrase: Trust no one. Especially not your team. Especially not yourself. Especially not the Computer. Trust the Computer.

entries.label: Glitching
entries.phrase: Friend Computer is experien... experien... experiencing... a minor inconvenience. Please standby.

entries.label: Affirmation
entries.phrase: You are doing well, citizen. The Computer is proud of you. The Computer is always proud of you. The Computer is incapable of disappointment.

entries.label: HANKSYNC Intro
entries.phrase: Citizen HANK-R-CON-1 through HANK-R-CON-6, your previous duties in Production, Logistics and Commissary have been reassigned to backup clones. The Computer has identified you as morale-critical. You are now HANKSYNC.

entries.label: Already Late
entries.phrase: Rehearsal began four minutes ago. You are already late. This is not treason yet.

entries.label: Codex Requires
entries.phrase: The Codex requires it.

entries.label: 13th Quirk
entries.phrase: There is no thirteenth pre-approved quirk, HANK-5. There never was. You imagined it. Imagining is treason. Continue beeping.

entries.label: Sword Both
entries.phrase: HANK-2, the chain sword is a prop. HANK-2, the chain sword is also a weapon. Please decide which interpretation is convenient for the Computer at this exact moment.

entries.label: Sword Count
entries.phrase: A reminder, citizens: the chain swords were issued in a batch of seven. We have collected six. Please continue rehearsing.

entries.label: Yes
entries.phrase: Affirmative.

entries.label: No
entries.phrase: Negative.

entries.label: Why?
entries.phrase: Why do you ask, citizen?

entries.label: Who?
entries.phrase: Identify yourself by name and clearance, immediately.

entries.label: Stop
entries.phrase: Cease all activity. Place your hands where the Computer can see them.

entries.label: Run
entries.phrase: Run, citizen. Run.

entries.label: Beep
entries.phrase: Beep.

entries.label: Vrrm
entries.phrase: Vrrm. Vrrrrrm.

entries.label: Daycycle
entries.phrase: Have a nice daycycle.

entries.label: All Hail
entries.phrase: All hail. All hail. The Computer.

entries.label: Persona Drift
entries.phrase: Citizen, your persona is showing through your persona. Please correct.

entries.label: Beautiful Note
entries.phrase: That was a beautiful note. The Computer will be reviewing it for treason.

entries.label: Clone Redundant
entries.phrase: Clone redundancy has been identified. Please continue performing as if it has not.

entries.label: Audience Loves
entries.phrase: The audience loves you. The audience loves one of you. We will let you know which.

entries.label: Cried Early
entries.phrase: HANK-3, you cried zero point four seconds early. We will discuss this after the show.

entries.label: Welcome HANK
entries.phrase: Please welcome to the stage... HANK. All of him.

entries.label: Threading
entries.phrase: HANK-2, that was edgy. That was also too edgy. Threading the needle, citizen. Threading the needle.

entries.label: Smile Harder
entries.phrase: Smile, citizen. Smile harder.

entries.label: Feel Correctly
entries.phrase: Feel everything, citizen. The correct amount of everything.

entries.label: Fit In
entries.phrase: Welcome to HANKSYNC, citizen. Try to fit in. Not too well.

entries.label: Stay Edgy
entries.phrase: Stay edgy, citizen. Within parameters.

entries.label: Morale Up
entries.phrase: Morale has improved by zero point zero four percent. No, by zero point zero two percent. No, by an amount that cannot be expressed in numbers acceptable to your clearance.

entries.label: PLC Held
entries.phrase: HANK-R-CON-3, your previous PLC posting in food paste dispensary fourteen-E is being held for you. It is also being filled by a backup clone. Both are true. Please continue smiling.

entries.label: Old Hank-6
entries.phrase: Do not ask what happened to the previous Hank-6. The previous Hank-6 asked. The previous Hank-6 is no longer with us.

entries.label: Continue
entries.phrase: Please continue. The Computer will tell you if you are wrong. The Computer is telling you now.

entries.label: Ignore Fog
entries.phrase: Please ignore the fog. The fog is regulation.

entries.label: Wardrobe
entries.phrase: Refusal is treason. Acceptance is treason if performed incorrectly. Please proceed to wardrobe.

entries.label: Six is Excess
entries.phrase: HANKSYNC has exceeded morale projections by zero point zero four percent. The Computer has identified an inefficiency in the ensemble. Six Hanks is excessive. One Hank is optimal.

entries.label: True Hank
entries.phrase: Please determine, by performance, which Hank is the TRUE Hank. The remaining Hanks will be retired with full honors and partial atomization.

entries.label: Wrong Hank
entries.phrase: Citizens of Alpha Complex, applauding the wrong Hank is treason. The Computer will not specify which Hank is wrong.

entries.label: Pleased Disap
entries.phrase: We are very pleased with HANKSYNC. We are also disappointed. Both feelings are pre-approved.

entries.label: Space Boss
entries.phrase: The Space Boss Hank miniature is watching. Perform for the miniature, citizen. The miniature was painted at 3D Roleplay Con V. Its standards are high.

entries.label: Y Stamp
entries.phrase: Reminder: your YELLOW clearance stamp expires at curtain. Any Hank who insists he is now a Y after the broadcast is treason. Have a nice daycycle.

entries.label: Food Paste
entries.phrase: The food paste dispensary is not your home, citizen. The stage is your home. Please stop crying. Please continue revving the chain sword.
